title: Adiye Enna Raagam Lyrics Rummy Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Adiye Enna Raagam
Singer(s): Abhay Jodhpurkar, Poornima Satish
Movie: Rummy
Music: D Imman
Lyrics: Yugabharathi

Adiye enna raagam neeyum paadura
azhagaa ulla poondhu saami aadura
vakkanayaa paakkura
vambugala koottura
sakkraya aadham pol ootura
enna ne yaeni mela yethura yethura

Adiye enna raagam neeyum paadura
azhagaa neeyum poodhu saami aadura

Idhuvara ippadi illa
kodukura rombavum tholla
edhuku ne porandha theriyala
edhukku nee vazhandha puriyala
podhuvaa unna ennai pogudhu en aavi
thonaiya nee illa, naan kattiduven kaavi

Irundhen thanda soraa,
enna nee cutikuraa, pola nee poosura
vaasamaa veesura ..

Adiye enna raagam neeyum paadura
azhagaa ulla poondhu saami aadura

Palaguna nanbana vitten
padipayum pattunu vitten
adikadi theruva paakuren
varuvenu vazhiya paakuren
thaniyaa naanum kooda katureney paatu
mulusaa unnaala naan aanen pulla theetu

Pasiyo mangi pochu
padukka thalli pochu
kaaranam neeyadi thookkava kaavadi

Adiye enna raagam
Adiye enna raagam neeyum paadura
azhagaa ulla poondhu saami aadura
vakkanayaa paakkura
vambugala koottura
sakkraya aadham pol ootura

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the lead actors in the movie Rummy?

The lead actors in the movie Rummy are Vijay Sethupathi and Gayathrie Shankar.

Who composed the music for the song Adiye Enna Raagam?

The music for the song was composed by D Imman.

What is the theme of the song Adiye Enna Raagam?

The song portrays themes of love and emotional longing, creating a romantic and melancholic atmosphere.

When was the movie Rummy released?

The movie Rummy was released in the year 2014.

Who penned the lyrics for Adiye Enna Raagam?

The lyrics were written by the talented lyricist Yugabharathi.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Adiye Enna Raagam from the movie Rummy, released in 2014, is a captivating romantic melody. Featuring the voices of Abhay Jodhpurkar and Poornima Satish, the song is composed by D Imman with lyrics by Yugabharathi. The film stars Vijay Sethupathi and Gayathrie Shankar, and the song beautifully conveys the emotions of love and longing. Its soothing tune and heartfelt lyrics make it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Adiye Enna Raagam from the movie Rummy is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Composed by D Imman, this song features the soulful voices of Abhay Jodhpurkar and Poornima Satish, paired with the heartfelt lyrics of Yugabharathi. Immerse yourself in this enchanting musical journey that beautifully portrays the emotions of romance and yearning.
stanzaMeanings: How much pain have you caused, oh God?
What is my melody? You sing beautifully, like a flower, oh God. I see the troubles around me, like a burden, why do you put me through this?
What is my melody? You sing beautifully, oh God.
Until now, it hasn't been like this. Why did you come into my life? I don't understand why you are here. When you leave, my soul feels empty, I will hold on tightly.
I was here, you cut me off, like you are blowing away the breeze.
What is my melody? You sing beautifully, oh God.
I lost my friend, I lost my song, I keep looking for the way, I am alone, I am also singing, because of you, I have become a man, but I am still lost.
I am hungry, I have been thrown out, the reason is you, you have taken away my burden.
What is my melody? What is my melody? You sing beautifully, like a flower, oh God. I see the troubles around me, like a burden, why do you put me through this?
